title: Run lifecycle: goal, defeat, instant scene reload

plan.note: PLAN: WorldState += runState/attemptCount/spawnTick; Lifecycle.ts FIRST in pipeline (resetPressed or defeated -> pure re-instantiation, attempt+1, spawnTick=tick, same frozen level ref); HazardsAndGoal.ts LAST (S3.4 share: goal strict-overlap -> completed, fall-below-world -> defeated; hazard lethality joins at S3.7); control/physics gain runState!=playing no-op guards (completion freezes world). Input-boundary refinement: Lifecycle consumes resetPressed; PlayerControl remains sole consumer of moveAxis/jumpPressed (dm-0019 split is by field).

anchor.note: ANCHOR: WorldState extension additive; instantiateWorld signature unchanged (lifecycle composes attempt/spawnTick on reload); existing 147-test suite is the regression gate for the two guards

implement.note: IMPLEMENT: WorldState += runState/attemptCount/spawnTick; Lifecycle.ts (reload = pure re-instantiation); HazardsAndGoal.ts (goal + fall-out); runState guards in control/physics

verify.note: VERIFY: 153/153 (+6: goal completes/clear does not, completion freeze until reset, pit-fall defeat + next-tick fresh world equal to re-derived fresh instantiation, resetPressed reload, cross-reload replay determinism, purity/no-op identity)

integrate.note: INTEGRATE: PKG +systems/lifecycle +systems/hazards_and_goal, entities/world summary + dependents updated, edges both directions, pkg_hash -> s3-d0f4a2

report.note: REPORT: S3.4 -> COMPLETED (REQ-003 P3 share done; P10 share open)

handoff.note: HANDOFF updated (resume at S3.5 the axiom)
